name: 911: Cannibal
short_description: A terrifying first-person hide-and-seek horror escape game. Outsmart a cannibal maniac, solve puzzles, and try to survive his creepy house.
detailed_description:
💀 911: Cannibal – A terrifying first-person horror game of hide and seek, puzzles, and survival.

You've been kidnapped by a maniac. Not just any maniac… a cannibal 🍽️ who hunts people and plays games with his victims. Trapped in his eerie house 🏚️ in the middle of nowhere, your only hope is to stay quiet, stay smart, and find a way out before dinner is served—and you’re the main course.

🕵️ Explore the house, find hidden objects, solve puzzles, and piece together the twisted story of Minnesota’s most feared killer. But be careful: the cannibal is always listening, always hunting. Make one wrong move, leave behind one clue—and your nightmare might end in his kitchen.

🔍 Features:

★ A branching detective story filled with mystery and fear

★ First-person survival gameplay with intense stealth mechanics

★ Atmospheric sound design and detailed environments

★ Collect notes to uncover the maniac's twisted past 🔓

★ Hide and seek horror – stay quiet or be hunted

Will you survive the horror, or will you become part of the story?

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian*, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Swedish, Japanese, Malay, Hindi
*languages with full audio support
